title: scrophularia libanotica var. urartuensis
intro: Scrophularia libanotica var. urartuensis, a subspecies of the Scrophularia libanotica plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Scrophularia libanotica var. urartuensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antioxidant, helping to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
